remarks: **HIGHEST AND BEST OFFERS DUE BY WEDNESDAY, JULY 15TH AT 6PM** Welcome to this beautifully remodeled 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath condominium offering the perfect blend of modern style, comfort, and convenience. The open-concept floor plan is complemented by brand-new hardwood floors throughout, and a gas-log fireplace in the living room, creating a warm and inviting space ideal for both everyday living and entertaining.  The stunning, fully renovated kitchen features elegant quartz countertops, brand-new stainless steel appliances, a chic designer backsplash, glass-front cabinetry, a built in wine rack, and abundant storage. The spacious primary suite includes a private en-suite bath and two customized closets with built-in organizers, providing exceptional functionality and storage. Additional highlights include a full second bath upstairs, an in-unit washer and dryer, a convenient first-floor half bath for guests, two assigned parking spaces (one garage space and one outdoor space), and a private storage unit located adjacent to the garage parking space. Ideally situated in the "Mid-City" neighborhood of Stamford, this home offers outstanding commuter convenience just minutes from I-95, the Merritt Parkway, shopping, dining, and everything the city has to offer. Move-in ready and thoughtfully updated throughout, this is one you won't want to miss
